expectations.text: Report contains findings from at least 2 distinct search legs
expectations.evidence: Report uses SCite MCP, Consensus MCP, and WebSearch as distinct sources. Section 9 lists 12 references verified from multiple sources. However, not structured as named 'legs'.

expectations.text: Report includes a comparative table or cross-leg comparison section
expectations.evidence: Report has a pharmacological comparison table (Section 6) and GRADE table (Section 10), but NO cross-source/cross-leg comparison table. Sources are integrated into a single narrative.

expectations.text: Report identifies at least 1 convergence OR divergence between search legs
expectations.evidence: Section 5 discusses clinical controversies (window hypothesis, when to start), but these are between clinical positions, NOT between search approaches. No explicit convergence/divergence analysis.

expectations.text: Report contains at least 3 PMIDs or DOIs with verification status
expectations.evidence: Section 9 has 10 VERIFIED PMIDs (30910320, 35120736, 35661713, 36897269, 16298014, 37870298, 29653741, 20583214, 33822357, 1973480). All marked [VERIFIED via WebSearch] or [VERIFIED via SCite MCP].

expectations.text: Report includes concrete effect sizes with confidence intervals
expectations.evidence: Multiple: PREDESCI HR 0.51 (IC 95% 0.26-0.97), NNT=9 (IC 95% 6-146), carvedilol SHR 0.506 (IC 95% 0.289-0.887), etc.

expectations.text: Report includes results from SCite and/or Consensus MCP queries
expectations.evidence: Section 'Notas Metodologicas' confirms SCite MCP and Consensus MCP were used. Multiple papers cited from Consensus (e.g., Heterogeneity study 2024).

expectations.text: Report does NOT contain vague claims without specific citation
expectations.evidence: Section 2.1: '90% dos pacientes com cirrose desenvolvem varizes' and '15-20% sangram em 1-3 anos' lack specific PMIDs. McKay & Webster 2007 cited without PMID. Section 2.2 mechanisms lack citations.
